sourceBasis.englishCollationTarget: M. R. James, The Apocryphal New Testament (1924), Third Epistle to the Corinthians
sourceBasis.armenianWitnessContext: Armenian Zohrab NT appendix pages 735-736 remain the Armenian canonical/historical witness context, not the English translation source.

migrationDecision.decision: Rebuild 3 Corinthians to a governed source-shaped structure before any candidate repair or trust promotion.

approvedFutureTargetShape.visibleSourceNumberingPolicy: preserve_source_numbering_in_raw/source-map records; do not silently correct anomalies in Bible candidate text without a separate policy

requiredBeforeCandidateMutation: Create exact source-body segmentation into intro narrative, section I, section II, and section III.

Run an audit proving no source rows are dropped, synthesized, silently renumbered, or merged without policy.
